mapper.select: SELECT * FROM article WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 3 ORDER BY published_at DESC
SELECT * FROM article ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT a.*, u.nickname as author_nickname, u.username as author_username FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT a.* FROM article a LEFT JOIN article_content ac ON a.id = ac.article_id WHERE a.status = 3 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ac.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY a.published_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (user_id, title, cover, status, reject_reason, category, tags, views, likes, comments, created_at, updated_at, published_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{cover}, #{status}, #{rejectReason}, #{category}, #{tags}, #{views}, #{likes}, #{comments}, NOW(), NOW(), #{publishedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET title = #{title}, cover = #{cover}, status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, category = #{category}, tags = #{tags}, updated_at = NOW(), published_at = #{publishedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET likes = likes - 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET comments = comments + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET comments = comments - 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 3 ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE status = 3

SELECT DISTINCT a.* FROM article a LEFT JOIN article_content ac ON a.id = ac.article_id WHERE a.status = 3 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ac.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY a.published_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM article a LEFT JOIN article_content ac ON a.id = ac.article_id WHERE a.status = 3 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ac.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
